_about: Curated registry of high-signal YouTube teachers, the primary source for ai-firehose.com. Eric edits this file. Each channel is polled via its free RSS feed: https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?channel_id=<channel_id> (no API key).
_instructions: Drop a list of handles: node scripts/onboard_youtube.mjs @a @b @c (resolves each, adds it here idempotently, and rebuilds the directory). --dry previews without writing; --weight and --kind set the batch defaults. It wraps node worker/sources/youtube_registry.mjs add @handle for single edits. Full runbook: docs/ONBOARD_YOUTUBE_CHANNEL.md. To resolve a channel_id by hand, search the channel page source for "channelId" or run yt-dlp --print channel_id <channel_url>. authority_weight in [0,1] scales how strongly the channel moves the rotation: favorite, highest-signal teachers near 1.0. kind_bias is only a hint; the classifier decides each video's kind. Set active true to include a channel. Every active channel also appears in the Watch browse-and-subscribe directory (public/data/directory.json); set hide_from_directory true to ingest for signal without listing it publicly.
